title: singlet-doublet summary schema extension
description: Extends the universal core summary schema for the singlet-doublet model. Pins model to 'singlet-doublet' and documents model-specific gate_check fields.

model.description: Model identifier pinned for singlet-doublet skill.

gate_check.description: Gate assertions computed at write time for singlet-doublet.

omega_in_band.description: True if omega_h2 falls within the benchmark acceptance band.

omega_deviation_pct.description: Fractional deviation of omega_h2 from the benchmark central value, as a percentage.
